    def match_from(self, data: Any, /) -> bool:

    match_path ¤

    match_path(path: PathLike) -> bool
    Source code in src/liblaf/melon/io/abc/_reader.py 
    31
32
33
    def match_path(self, path: PathLike, /) -> bool:
    path = Path(path)
    return path.suffix in self.extensions

    def __init__(self, to_type: type[T], /) -> None:
    self.converters = []
    self.to_type = to_type

    converters instance-attribute ¤

    converters: list[AbstractConverter] = []

    to_type instance-attribute ¤

    to_type: type[T] = to_type

    __call__ ¤

    __call__(data: Any, /, **kwargs) -> T

41
    def __call__(self, data: Any, /, **kwargs) -> T:
    return self.convert(data, **kwargs)

    convert ¤

    convert(data: Any, /, **kwargs) -> T
    Source code in src/liblaf/melon/io/abc/_converter.py 
    43
44
45
46
47
48
49
    def convert(self, data: Any, /, **kwargs) -> T:
    if isinstance(data, self.to_type):
        return data
    for converter in self.converters:
        if converter.match_from(data):
            return converter.convert(data, **kwargs)
    raise UnsupportedConverterError(data, self.to_type)

    register ¤

    register(converter: AbstractConverter) -> None
    Source code in src/liblaf/melon/io/abc/_converter.py 
    51
52
    def register(self, converter: AbstractConverter, /) -> None:
    bisect.insort(self.converters, converter, key=lambda c: -c.precedence)

    def __init__(self, dtype: type[T], /) -> None:
    self.dtype = dtype
    self.readers = []

    readers instance-attribute ¤

    readers: list[AbstractReader] = []

    __call__ ¤

    __call__(path: PathLike, /, **kwargs) -> T

    def __call__(self, path: PathLike, /, **kwargs) -> T:
    return self.load(path, **kwargs)

    load ¤

    load(path: PathLike, /, **kwargs) -> T
    Source code in src/liblaf/melon/io/abc/_reader.py 
    47
48
49
50
51
52
53
54
    def load(self, path: PathLike, /, **kwargs) -> T:
    path = Path(path)
    for reader in self.readers:
        if reader.match_path(path):
            data: T = reader.load(path, **kwargs)
            logger.opt(depth=2).debug('Loaded {} from "{}".', type(data), path)
            return data
    raise UnsupportedReaderError(self.dtype, path)

    register ¤

    register(reader: AbstractReader) -> None
    Source code in src/liblaf/melon/io/abc/_reader.py 
    56
57
    def register(self, reader: AbstractReader, /) -> None:
    bisect.insort(self.readers, reader, key=lambda r: -r.precedence)

    UnsupportedConverterError ¤

    UnsupportedConverterError(data: Any, to_type: type)

    def __init__(self, data: Any, to_type: type, /) -> None:
    self.data = data
    self.to_type = to_type
    super().__init__(f"Cannot convert {type(data)} to {to_type}.")

    data instance-attribute ¤

    data: Any = data

    to_type instance-attribute ¤

    to_type: type = to_type

    def __init__(self, dtype: type, path: PathLike, /) -> None:

    super().__init__(f'Cannot load "{self.path}" as {dtype}.')

    def __init__(self, data: Any, path: PathLike, /) -> None:
    self.data = data
    self.path = Path(path)
    super().__init__(f'Cannot save {type(data)} to "{self.path}".')

    data instance-attribute ¤

    return self.save(path, data, **kwargs)

    register ¤

    register(writer: AbstractWriter) -> None
    Source code in src/liblaf/melon/io/abc/_writer.py 
    49
50
    def register(self, writer: AbstractWriter, /) -> None:
    bisect.insort(self.writers, writer, key=lambda r: -r.precedence)

    save ¤

    save(path: PathLike, data: Any, /, **kwargs) -> None
    Source code in src/liblaf/melon/io/abc/_writer.py 
    52
53
54
55
56
57
58
59
    def save(self, path: PathLike, data: Any, /, **kwargs) -> None:
    for writer in self.writers:
        if writer.match_data(data) and writer.match_path(path):
            Path(path).parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
            writer.save(path, data, **kwargs)
            logger.opt(depth=2).debug('Saved {} to "{}".', type(data), path)
            return
    raise UnsupportedWriterError(data, path)
    June 23, 2025 June 23, 2025
